_comment: URL provenance registry. EVERY external http(s) URL hardcoded in tools/*.py and shared/**/*.py MUST be declared here with an honest status. This is the code-side analog of the source/verified provenance on data records — it exists because an AI operating this repo can confabulate plausible-looking URLs, so the system must force every URL to be consciously declared and catch any that aren't. Enforced by health.scan_url_provenance() + sync_check invariant #13. Status vocabulary: 'verified' = a human/tool confirmed this exact URL returns the expected content (record the date); 'well_known' = a documented public API/service endpoint (real service, standard path, not individually fetch-tested here); 'unverified' = used in code but NOT confirmed — may be wrong, treat as a guess until verified; 'example' = appears only in docstring/usage text, never fetched.
policy: An UNREGISTERED url in code is a hard drift failure (it may be fabricated). An 'unverified' url is allowed but surfaced — it must be confirmed (and re-statused) before anything relies on it. Never state an unverified url to a user as if it were confirmed.

urls.note: FLDOE Education Data System Master School ID list. Confirmed: a saved copy parses to 7,180 FL schools with DIST/SCHL numbers. The authoritative MSID source. NOT a file download — an interactive page saved from a browser.
CPALMS standards search (FL standards authority). JS app; used by fl_lookup/cache/parse_fl_standards as the documented standards source.
CPALMS root (FL standards authority).
Firecrawl public API base (cloud_web_crawl capability, OFF by default).
Internet Archive CDX API (documented public endpoint) for the render wayback prong.
Internet Archive Wayback snapshot path (documented).
Internet Archive Wayback availability API (documented public endpoint) — fetch_resilient.py wayback prong.
Orange County Public Schools root domain (confirmed real district site).
FLDOE academic standards page (also tracked in registries/florida-standards.json). Real page, 403s scripts directly; used as a docstring usage example in tools/acquire.py.

Real FLDOE page but returns HTTP 403 to scripts (bot protection) — confirmed by seed_probe 2026-06-28. NOT the MSID data itself; the authoritative machine-readable source is the eds.fldoe.org EDS app (browser-save). Do NOT present as a download.
